chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. C.P No. D- 747 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections at Flag ‘A’. 2. For orders on MA No. 3020/2022 3. For hearing of main case. 01.02.2024. M/s Arif Ali Abbassi and Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with DSP Abdul Qudoos Site Area Sukkur and ASI Dhani Bux on behalf of S.S.P Sukkur. -.-.-. This petition has been filed for arrest of the absconding accused in crime No. 32/2021 Police Station Airport Sukkur under sections 302,114, 148, 149 PPC. It is reported that challan has been submitted and the trial Court has seized with the matter. The petitioner shall approach the trial Court for arrest of the absconders and directions to the police for this purpose. This petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
